title: 菊花賞の後に・人生のステイヤー

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... It's far... too far...
choice_data_list: Is this distance hard for you?
Is this distance hard for you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
No, not that... What's too far is the distance
between me and McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I thought I closed the gap, but I'm still not there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is formidable, after all—even more so
at 3,000 meters, her specialty.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It appears that you've retained your pride. Well
done, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen... I lost. The difference in our
long-distance potential really is a world apart.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, that's to be expected. I've always kept my
focus on long distances, ever since I was a young
child.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would never give in easily. And there is a great
difference in the time I've spent honing my skills.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So you've spent way more time at it than I have...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I see... Trainer, I don't think I lost due to a lack of
talent at long-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm behind in terms of distance, sure, but the
bigger difference is the number of years we've
spent training for this.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
McQueen has always been focused on winning.
And it's only recently that I've really begun to try.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
That difference in time spent... That's what sets us
apart now. I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen... You could say she's a lifelong
stayer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When comparing their experiences, Mejiro Ryan
is undeniably green.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It seems that I still have the advantage in terms of
stability. But the next time around...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I hope to see your true resolve, something
spectacular in the final furlong.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I see...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You got it! I promise you, McQueen! You'll see it
next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uh... So the next big race is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen! You'll be racing me again there,
right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe, who knows? I can't make any promises.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Ryan loses to Mejiro McQueen,
there's no look of inferiority in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there's still a long road ahead of her—toward
the Arima Kinen, where many more strong
opponents await.
